intended_use: AliveCor QT Service analyzes seconds of a previously acquired electrocardiogram from AliveCor designed read-an-ambulatory devices, AliveCor QT Service provides QT and heart rate corrected QT interval
intended_use_full: AliveCor QT Service analyzes seconds of a previously acquired electrocardiogram from AliveCor designed read-an-ambulatory devices, AliveCor QT Service provides QT and heart rate corrected QT interval measurements on only on patients analyzed as normal sinus rhythm for QT interval measurements
target_condition: QT interval assessment in patients with normal sinus rhythm
ground_truth: Expert-annotated reference intervals from supplied diagnostic band width (12-lead algorithm) and Bazett's formula for QTc correction; comparison to predicate device (Cardia algorithm)
other_metrics: Mean interval difference of 6 ms with standard deviation of 49 ms when compared to expert-annotated reference intervals; algorithm performance evaluated using standards-based and proprietary databases
